metadata.name: Change the Shell Environment
metadata.description: Edit a user profile, create shell variables, and create environment variables

tasks.name: Verify PS1 variable is set in ~/.bashrc
tasks.description: The ~/.bashrc file should contain a PS1 variable setting with time format
tasks.success_message: PS1 variable is correctly configured in ~/.bashrc with time format
tasks.failure_message: PS1 variable is not configured correctly in ~/.bashrc
hints: The \t escape sequence displays the current time
Remember to source ~/.bashrc after editing to apply changes

tasks.name: Verify examplefile has been deleted
tasks.description: The examplefile should have been deleted using a shell variable
tasks.success_message: The examplefile has been successfully removed
tasks.failure_message: The examplefile still exists in the home directory
hints: Delete the file using the variable: rm $file
